title: For a Life That Is Winding Down
scripture_text: I have fought the good fight, I have finished the race, I have kept the faith.
reflection: You have done it. The race is the running, not the winning. You finished. Be at peace.
body:
The end is closer than the beginning. You can feel it, in the way the body moves, in the way the years pile up behind you.

It is okay to be tired. It is okay to let go. The Lord is not asking you to be what you were. He is asking you to trust Him with the closing.

You have loved well. You have worked hard. You have shown up. The Lord saw every one of those days, even the ones that felt invisible. He is keeping a record that you will be glad to read, one day, when the reading is possible.

For now, rest. Rest is not a failure. Rest is a kind of finishing.

The Lord is with you in the unwinding. He will be with you in the next thing, too.
prayer: Lord, I am tired. Take me home, in Your time. And until then, give me peace. Amen.
